calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar Jun-08-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Adriana J. Quintero for petitioner Philip Anglim.

Ms. Quintero confirmed that no objections had been raised to the petition. The Court stated that the evidence before him was that the account was intended to be in the trust, and he accordingly granted the petition confirming trust assets (order signed).

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy John Boncato. (Not reported)
